title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How important is fashion and appearance to you?
Do you think how we dress affects how people treat us?
Do you follow fashion trends or develop your own style?
Have your views on fashion changed as you've got older?
Do you think appearance is judged too much in today's society?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think social pressure to look a certain way is stronger today than in the past?
Is it important for people to express their identity through their clothes?
Do you think the fashion industry has a negative impact on the environment?
